name: Bisquick Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 1 Large Can Peaches, in Heavy Syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Melt the margarine in a (13" x 9") baking pan.
3. Mix the milk, sugar, and Bisquick together in a bowl.
4. Pour the mixture into the melted margarine.
5. Pour off half the syrup from the peaches.
6. Spread the peaches with the remaining syrup on top of the batter.
7. Bake for 45 minutes.
8. Serve warm.
